Item Name: Prime Bites Minis | Protein Mini Muffins from Alpha Prime Supplements | High Protein, Collagen Fortified Low Sugar Treat | Delicious Snack | 12 Packs per Box - Variety Pack Bullet Point 1: PROTEIN + COLLAGEN: Packed with flavor and nutrition, each low-sugar Prime Bites Mini Muffin snack has 15 grams of protein and 5 grams of collagen. This delicious treat is handcrafted with premium whey protein rather than wheat protein, giving you a full punch of amino acids. Bullet Point 2: SNACKS FOR ADULTS: We love the snacks we ate as children, but we don't love how they make us feel. Prime Bites Protein Minis were designed with men and women athletes of all types, fitness enthusiasts, and any health-conscious adult in mind. These individually wrapped muffin packs can be taken on the go as a good breakfast, a snack option between meals, or a protein-packed dessert. Bullet Point 3: CLASSIC MUFFIN FLAVORS: Prime Bites Protein Minis come in all your favorite muffin flavors including Blueberry Muffin, Chocolate Fudge, and Birthday Cake, We also offer a convenient variety pack so you can explore all the delicious options. Bullet Point 4: AMAZING TEXTURE: Unlike most dried-up protein bars, Alpha Prime Bites Mini Muffins are wonderful tasting with a soft texture. Our little muffins have minimal fat and sugar, with roughly 75% less sugar than the average mini muffin. These guilt-free snacks are made using healthy-first ingredients. Bullet Point 5: MADE IN THE USA: Alpha Prime Bites food products are proudly hand-baked in the USA in manufacturing facilities that adhere to the highest standards for quality using tested, safe, and effective ingredients that you can use with confidence. Product Description:

Prime Bites Protein Minis

Treat yourself to the delicious taste of Prime Bites Minis by Alpha Prime, the perfect protein-packed snack that brings the comfort of a delicious muffin snack with the nutritional benefits your body craves. Each bite is loaded with 15g of high-quality whey protein and fortified with 5g of collagen. Hand-baked in the USA, our protein muffins deliver a rich, decadent flavor that rivals your favorite breakfast treat—without the high levels of fat and sugar.

Snack time, redefined.

Prime Bites mini muffins are more than just a snack; they're a revolution in healthy eating. Designed for everyone from sports enthusiasts to busy parents, these little treats make it easy to stick to your health goals without compromising on taste. Whether you're looking for a post-workout treat, an afternoon pick-me-up, a decadent dessert, or a midnight snack, Prime Bites minis are a delicious solution.

Where delicious meets nutritious

We know the struggle of finding protein snacks that taste good, which is why we've created a product that not only meets your nutritional needs but also satisfies your sweet tooth. Unlike other protein snacks that can be dry and grainy, Prime Bites minis are moist, flavorful, and packed with the indulgent taste of your favorite baked goods.

Hand-baked in the USA

Our commitment to quality means you're getting a snack made with the finest ingredients. Prime Bites minis are low in sugar, high in protein, and made with whey protein. Try heating them in the microwave for a fresh-baked experience or enjoy them straight out of the package whenever you are craving something sweet. With the perfect balance of taste and nutrition, our mini muffins are the better-for-you treat that everyone will love.

Value: 2.12 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium health-focused snack positioned as a gourmet alternative to traditional protein bars, emphasizing high protein (15g per serving) and collagen content with a moist, indulgent texture. The variety pack bundling offers convenience and variety appeal, targeting health-conscious adults, athletes, and busy professionals. Brand positioning as 'hand-baked in the USA' with 'guilt-free' ingredients suggests a mid-to-high price point justified by quality, nutritional benefits, and superior texture compared to competitors. Packaging design and flavor variety enhance perceived value.

catalog_content:
Item Name: KURUKAHVECI MEHMET EFENDI Turkish Coffee, Arabica Beans, Roasted Ground,Rich Aroma, Fresh, Medium to Heavy-bodied, Original Taste Since 1871 (8.8 OZ / 250 Gr) Pack of 3
Bullet Point 1: SINCE 1871 Turkish Coffee: Kurukahveci Mehmet Efendi Turkish Coffee, the oldest method of coffee brewing, delights with its unique combination of foam, coffee, and grounds. Kurukahveveci Mehmet Efendi stands as a prominent symbol in the world of Coffee, providing an extensive range of Turkish Coffee options tailored to satisfy diverse palates. With flavors meticulously crafted to meet the preferences of discerning consumers, Mehmet Efendi promises an unparalleled coffee experience.
Bullet Point 2: Authentic Turkish Coffee Experience: Crafted with premium ingredients, Mehmet Efendi Turkish coffee delivers a rich, bold flavor and thick consistency, reminiscent of true Turkish coffee traditions.
Bullet Point 3: Served in delicate-edged cups, Turkish Coffee cools down slower compared to other types, offering an extended enjoyment. Kurukahveci Mehmet Efendi Turkish Coffee offers a rich flavor reminiscent of true Turkish coffee traditions, carefully crafted with premium ingredients to ensure a strong, bold taste and thick consistency that will make you feel right back at home when served at your next special occasion.
Bullet Point 4: Turkish coffee, with its tradition of being served unsweetened and its healthy attributes due to the undrunk grounds settling at the cup's bottom, is not only free from causing bloating even with frequent consumption in small portions but also emerges as a potential aid for individuals aiming.
Bullet Point 5: Our specially packaged Mehmet Efendi Turkish coffee ensures freshness and flavor retention, allowing you to purchase any desired quantity with confidence. With our unique vacuum-sealed foil packaging featuring cover walls, the rich taste and intense aroma of our authentic coffee are preserved until its expiration date, guaranteeing a consistently perfect cup every time.
Product Description: Turkish Coffee is the name given to a type of coffee whose preparation and brewing techniques were invented by the Turks. It has a unique taste, froth, aroma, brewing technique and presentation… in other words it has its own identity and tradition. The first coffee was made in the Arabian Peninsula by boiling coffee cherries. The new method invented by the Turks revealed coffee’s true flavour and peerless aroma. The Turks introduced coffee to Europe where for many years it was prepared and consumed as Turkish Coffee. Turkish Coffee is made from arabica coffee beans from Central and South America that are blended and carefully roasted, then very finely ground. The coffee is mixed with water and the desired amount of sugar and cooked in a ”cezve”, or Turkish coffeepot. The coffee is served in small cups. The coffee must be left to stand for a short time after serving to allow the grounds to settle at the bottom of the cup. In contrast to other brewing methods, it is especially important that the coffee comes to a boil while brewing. The finely ground coffee is brought to a slow boil over low heat. Thanks to its strong body, delicious flavour and long-lasting aroma, a cup of steaming hot Turkish coffee is a guaranteed favourite with all coffee lovers.
Value: 26.4
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: A premium heritage brand with a rich legacy since 1871, positioning itself as a high-quality Turkish coffee option. The vacuum-sealed packaging ensures freshness and flavor retention, reinforcing premium quality. The pack of 3 cans (250g each) offers a multi-unit deal, enhancing perceived value while maintaining a traditional, artisanal image. The brand’s historical prestige and specialized brewing method justify a mid-to-high price point, targeting discerning coffee enthusiasts.
